glasswing_targets.known_count_notes: Mozilla MFSA 2026-30 (Firefox 150) reports 271 vulnerabilities fixed from a single Claude Mythos evaluation pass (41 CVE-tier entries; 3 explicitly credited to Claude in the advisory). Previous '40 total' framing reflected early-April coverage and did not yet include the Firefox 150 disclosure announced 2026-04-21/22. 271-vs-3 ratio of total-fixes-to-CVE-credited means the headline number substantially overstates CVE-severity of Mythos findings.

claude_credited_notes.CVE-2026-4747: FreeBSD NFS RCE — confirmed Glasswing autonomous find
claude_credited_notes.CVE-2026-5194: wolfSSL cert validation bypass — press-confirmed Mythos Preview-assisted, Carlini @ Anthropic
claude_credited_notes.CVE-2026-5588: Bouncy Castle — credited to Carlini + Claude
claude_credited_notes.CVE-2026-6746: Firefox 150 — officially credited to Claude in MFSA 2026-30 (2026-04-21/22)
claude_credited_notes.CVE-2026-6757: Firefox 150 JavaScript invalid pointer — officially credited to Claude in MFSA 2026-30
claude_credited_notes.CVE-2026-6758: Firefox 150 JavaScript use-after-free — officially credited to Claude in MFSA 2026-30

probable_participant_cves.description: CVEs from Glasswing participant companies that meet probable self-scan criteria: participant vendor + HTTP-parsing-adjacent + no prior attacker exploitation + no obvious third-party researcher credit + bug pattern consistent with automated scanning (input validation, logic, cert handling). Separate from confirmed/attributed Glasswing count.

entries.notes: Batch of 3 ISE RCEs disclosed simultaneously — cluster pattern consistent with systematic AI audit
Same batch as -20180; identical attack pattern, different code path
Third ISE RCE in same batch; requires full admin creds vs read-only for -20180/-20186
Certificate validation flaw in SSO integration. Same disclosure batch as ISE bugs. Pattern consistent with TLS/cert-handling audit sweep

baseline_data.monthly_cve_2026_notes: 2026-04 MTD through Apr-29 23:59Z = 5720 (NVD totalResults). Days elapsed 29; extrapolated full-month = 5920 (used as chart anchor in glasswing.html). Q1 average 5418/mo; April pace ~197/day, consistent with steady-state, no Mythos volume shock visible. Counter-argument: NVD publication latency 4-8 weeks, so Mythos disclosures from April may not appear until mid-May. Final April number captured at next refresh once month closes.

rhel8_security.note: stack.watch dropped the /8.0 version-specific path; use parent URL (covers all RHEL versions). 2026 YTD: 115 per stack.watch fetched 2026-04-29 (Q1 = 98, April delta = 17). April 2026 RHEL count of 17 remains below the 23-25/month Q1 pace; final 2 days of April produced no new entries.

baseline_data.kev_monthly_2026_notes: April KEV total at 30 (catalogVersion 2026.04.28, released 2026-04-28T17:29Z, total 1585 entries). No KEV catalog change in last 24h; CVE-2024-1708 (ConnectWise ScreenConnect path traversal, CWE-22) and CVE-2026-32202 (Microsoft Windows Shell spoofing, CWE-693, actively exploited) remain the most recent additions from 2026-04-28. Q1-2026 KEV monthly avg = (17+28+26)/3 = 23.7. April 30 entries closes the month above the Q1 mean. Notable April 2026 KEV entries: ConnectWise ScreenConnect 2026-04-28, Windows Shell 2026-04-28, SimpleHelp pair 2026-04-24, Samsung MagicINFO 2026-04-24, D-Link DIR-823X 2026-04-24, Marimo 2026-04-23, Defender BlueHammer 2026-04-22, Cisco SD-WAN cluster 2026-04-20, ActiveMQ 2026-04-16, SharePoint 2026-04-14, Adobe Acrobat 2026-04-13.

exploit_watch_list.description: HTTP-parsing-adjacent CVEs predicted to be actively exploited. Analyst adds entries; refresh agent checks KEV status.
exploit_watch_list.focus: HTTP-parsing attack surface only: web servers, template engines, TLS terminators, reverse proxy components, API frameworks, browser-delivered payloads

server.product: Cisco ISE (crafted HTTP → RCE, read-only admin)

exploit_intelligence.description: Tracks public exploit availability for watch list CVEs across ExploitDB, Metasploit, and GitHub PoC repos. Updated daily by refresh agent.

github_poc.notes: PoC exploits circulating in researcher communities per CSO Online / The Hacker Wire 2026-04-17; not aggregated in public indexes yet
Same Thymeleaf cluster as CVE-2026-40477 — PoCs circulating
No dedicated PoC published to major indexes; researchers likely holding to allow patching window
Ni8mare: Cyera Research published technical writeup with attack chain; Orca Security, Picus, Upwind all published explainers. Working attack chain in the wild.

Sysdig Threat Research observed ITW exploitation within 9h 41m of disclosure WITHOUT public exploit code. Technical writeups (Resecurity, Security Affairs, Endor Labs, CSA Lab Space) contain sufficient detail for ad-hoc PoC reconstruction. Weaponized classification based on active ITW, not a published PoC.

exploit_intelligence.notes_2026_04_28: Incremental re-check 2026-04-28: no new public exploit code observed for any of the 14 watch list CVEs since the 2026-04-25 full scan and 2026-04-27 incremental. Cisco ISE/Webex (CVE-2026-20180/20186/20147/20184) remain at maturity=none; wolfSSL pair (-5194/-5501) remain none; Thymeleaf pair (-40477/-40478) remain poc; n8n -21858 remains functional (Cyera PoC); five KEV-confirmed CVEs (-39987/-32201/-34197/-34621/-33825) remain weaponized. No KEV catalog change in last 24h (still 2026.04.24 / 1583 entries / 28 April adds).
exploit_intelligence.notes_2026_04_29: 2026-04-29 incremental check: spot-checked CVE-2026-39987 (Marimo, weaponized — unchanged, ITW exploitation continues per The Hacker News), CVE-2026-20180 (Cisco ISE, no public PoC — unchanged), CVE-2026-5194 (wolfSSL, no public PoC — unchanged). No watch list maturity escalations observed in last 24h. ConnectWise ScreenConnect CVE-2024-1708 added to KEV today (NP+DI candidate, not on watch list — flagged for analyst review). Microsoft confirmed active exploitation of Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202 (auth bypass / spoofing, CWE-693; not NP-applicable, desktop/local).
exploit_intelligence.notes_2026_04_30: 2026-04-30 incremental check: no maturity changes for the 18 watch list CVEs since 2026-04-29 sweep. Spot-checked CVE-2026-39987 (Marimo, weaponized — ITW exploitation continues per Sysdig threat intel), CVE-2026-20180/20186/20147 (Cisco ISE, no public PoC indexed), CVE-2026-5194 (wolfSSL, no public PoC), Spring AI cluster (-40966/40967/40978/40979/40980, fresh Apr-27/28 disclosures, no public PoC indexed yet). Thymeleaf pair (-40477/-40478) remain at maturity=poc. n8n Ni8mare (-21858) remains functional. Five KEV-confirmed CVEs (-39987/-32201/-34197/-34621/-33825) remain weaponized. ConnectWise ScreenConnect CVE-2024-1708 (added to KEV 2026-04-28) is an NP+DI candidate (CWE-22 path traversal in HTTP file-upload extension handling) but is a 2024 CVE outside the watch list scope; flagged for analyst review. Microsoft Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202 (added to KEV 2026-04-28) is auth-bypass / spoofing (CWE-693) on local desktop, not NP-applicable, no watch list action.
